title: Self-organized Floquet band geometry in cavity-driven quantum materials
summary: Floquet engineering has emerged as a powerful route to dynamically control band structure and topology in quantum materials, but most implementations rely on externally imposed laser fields that are power intensive, difficult to integrate into devices, and weakly coupled to the electronic system. We propose and analyze an alternative paradigm in which a self-generated cavity field Floquet-dresses the electronic bands and produces a geometric Hall response in an electrically driven cavity material system. We consider a semiconductor layer embedded in a cavity and coupled to external leads and a bath of acoustic phonons, where dc pumping leads to the buildup of a coherent intracavity field through light-matter coupling. We determine the resulting nonequilibrium steady state self-consistently and show that, above threshold, the coupled system settles into a stable time-periodic limit cycle with a field amplitude set by the cavity quality factor and dissipation. This emergent periodic field Floquet-dresses the electronic bands and modifies the anomalous Hall response of a material with broken time-reversal symmetry. We demonstrate that the resulting Hall conductivity can be directly probed via in-plane dc transport measurements. Our work establishes a route to self organized Floquet band reconstruction and geometric transport without external laser illumination, highlighting cavity driven steady states as a platform for electrically controlled nonequilibrium phases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并分析了一种无需外部激光、通过自生腔场实现Floquet能带工程的新范式，在电驱动的腔体材料系统中实现几何霍尔响应。
AI.motivation: 传统Floquet工程依赖外部激光场，存在功耗大、难以集成、与电子系统耦合弱等问题。作者希望提出一种替代方案，通过自生的腔场实现Floquet能带重构。
AI.method: 将半导体层嵌入光学腔中，连接外部电极和声子热库。通过直流泵浦驱动，经光-物质耦合在腔内建立相干场，自洽求解非平衡稳态。利用该周期性场对电子能带进行Floquet修饰，计算反常霍尔响应。
AI.result: 在阈值以上，耦合系统进入稳定的时间周期极限环，场振幅由腔品质因子和耗散决定。该周期场成功Floquet修饰了电子能带，改变了具有时间反演对称性破缺材料的反常霍尔响应，且霍尔电导可通过面内直流输运直接测量。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一条无需外部激光照射、实现自组织Floquet能带重构和几何输运的路线，揭示了腔驱动稳态作为电控非平衡相的平台潜力。

title: Non-Hermitian Crystalline Braid Topology from Hermitian Projection: A Zero-Mode Resonance Mechanism
comment: 49 pages main text, 17 pages SM, 31 figures
summary: Non-Hermitian topological phases are usually engineered through gain, loss, asymmetric couplings, or explicit environmental channels. Here we show that non-Hermitian crystalline braid topology can instead emerge from projection alone, starting from a fully Hermitian and topologically trivial parent lattice. The mechanism is zero-mode-resonant projection. When the eliminated complement is zero-mode free, projection has a smooth low-frequency limit and reduces to a static Schur complement, yielding conventional SSH-type descendants. When a complement zero mode couples to the retained subsystem, the embedding self-energy develops a pole, the zero-frequency limit becomes singular, and topology is carried by the finite-frequency projected Green's function-where frequency is a tunable parameter, the drive frequency in a circuit realization, for instance. We demonstrate this mechanism in an exactly solvable model, a trivial nearest-neighbor square lattice with an embedded one-dimensional zig-zag brane. Odd-parity periodic sectors are resonant: a sublattice-imbalance zero mode generates the singular self-energy, and the complex spectrum forms an abelian two-band braid whose transitions occur only at isolated finite frequencies. Although the internal class is $\text{AI}^†$ featuring only trivial phases, embedding parity induces conjugated pseudo-Hermiticity (CPH), quantizes the complex Berry phase, and identifies it with the braid count. The model is free of the non-Hermitian skin effect, making the invariant a genuine Bloch bulk quantity. In topolectrical realizations, the same finite-frequency braid transitions appear as transmission zeros and admittance features at the predicted drive frequencies.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，从完全厄米且拓扑平庸的母体晶格出发，仅通过投影即可产生非厄米晶体辫拓扑。机制是零模共振投影：当被消除的补空间不含零模时，投影平滑并退化为静态Schur补，得到常规SSH型后代；而当补空间零模与保留子系统耦合时，自能出现极点，零频极限奇异，拓扑由有限频投影格林函数承载。在可精确求解的模型中，奇宇称周期扇区共振，复频谱形成阿贝尔两带辫，其转变仅发生在孤立有限频率处。该模型无非厄米趋肤效应，拓扑不变量为真正的布洛赫体量。
AI.motivation: 探索是否可以在不引入增益、损耗、非对称耦合或显式环境通道的情况下，仅通过投影从完全厄米且拓扑平庸的母体晶格中产生非厄米拓扑相。
AI.method: 提出零模共振投影机制——当补空间零模与保留子系统耦合时，自能产生极点，使得有限频投影格林函数承载拓扑。在可精确求解的最近邻正方晶格嵌入一维锯齿膜模型上验证，通过奇偶宇称周期性区段分析，利用共轭赝厄米性量化复Berry相位并与辫数对应。
AI.result: 奇宇称周期性扇区中，子晶格不平衡零模产生奇异自能，复频谱形成阿贝尔两带辫拓扑，转变仅发生在孤立有限频率处。虽然内部对称类AI†仅有平庸相，但嵌入宇称诱导共轭赝厄米性，将复Berry相位与辫数等同。模型无非厄米趋肤效应，拓扑不变量为真布洛赫体量。在拓扑电路实现中，有限频辫转变表现为预测驱动频率下的传输零点和导纳特征。
AI.conclusion: 证明了非厄米晶体辫拓扑可以通过纯投影机制从厄米平庸母体产生，为拓扑物理提供了新的设计原理，并在拓扑电路中得到实验可验证的预言。

title: Descriptor Covariance and Correlation Hierarchy in Moiré Exciton Photoluminescence
summary: We develop a minimal theory for the spatial organization of photoluminescence spectra in moiré transition-metal dichalcogenide heterobilayers. Motivated by hyperspectral mapping of MoSe$_2$/WSe$_2$, which reveals micron-scale correlations among nine peak-decomposition-free spectral descriptors, we propose a descriptor-based disorder-filter picture in which different descriptors probe different components of a multi-scale disorder landscape, producing a hierarchy of spatial correlation lengths. The central result is the correlation hierarchy $ξ(E_{\rm cent}) \ge ξ(E_{\rm dom})$, derived from the decomposition of the dominant-peak energy into a smooth background contribution and a short-range trap-switching fluctuation term. The same framework explains the principal inter-descriptor Spearman correlations, including the near-perfect anti-correlation $ρ_{\rm S}(ΔE_{\rm cd}, R_{\rm HL}) \approx -0.978$ as a robust spectral-shape relation for spectra with a dominant unimodal envelope. The framework provides a peak-decomposition-free route to infer effective disorder parameters from hyperspectral data through the descriptor covariance structure, without microscopic line assignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种最小理论，用于解释Moiré TMD异质双层中光致发光谱的空间组织，通过描述符基的无序过滤图像揭示了谱描述符之间的空间相关性层次，并提供了一种无需峰分解即可从高光谱数据推断有效无序参数的途径。
AI.motivation: 高光谱映射MoSe₂/WSe₂揭示了九个无峰分解谱描述符之间的微米尺度相关性，现有理论无法解释这些复杂的空间组织模式，需要一种新的理论框架来理解多尺度无序景观中不同描述符的响应机制。
AI.method: 提出了描述符基的无序过滤图像，将主导峰能量分解为平滑背景贡献和短程陷阱切换涨落项，推导出相关层次ξ(E_cent) ≥ ξ(E_dom)，并通过Spearman相关分析解释了描述符间的关联结构。
AI.result: 核心结果是导出了相关层次ξ(E_cent) ≥ ξ(E_dom)；解释了包括近完美反相关ρ_S(ΔE_cd, R_HL) ≈ -0.978在内的主要描述符间Spearman相关关系。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一条无需峰分解的路径，通过描述符协方差结构从高光谱数据推断有效无序参数，无需微观谱线归属，为理解Moiré TMD异质双层中的无序效应提供了新视角。

title: Layer-Polarization-Driven Metal-Insulator Transition in multi-band Graphene Moire' Superlattices
summary: Graphene/hBN moiré superlattices provide a highly tunable platform for exploring emergent quantum phases in low-dimensional systems. Here, we investigate the moiré superlattice formed between hBN and ABA-stacked trilayer graphene (TLG), an inherently multi-band system. We demonstrate that the moiré potential is not merely a perturbation but a tool to hybridize the distinct massless and massive electronic sectors of TLG. By applying a perpendicular displacement field to tune layer polarization, we drive a fundamental reconstruction of the electronic band structure. Specifically, increasing the displacement field evolves the system from a multi-band regime to an effectively single-band regime at low energies, accompanied by a metal--insulator transition at the hole-doped secondary Dirac point. This transition originates from a redistribution of carriers across graphene layers that selectively enhances their coupling to the extrinsic moiré potential. Quantum capacitance measurements provide direct evidence for the suppression of the density of states at the hole-side secondary Dirac point, consistent with gap opening and the emergence of a displacement-field-tuned band gap. Theoretical calculations reproduce these observations and identify layer-selective coupling to the moiré potential as the underlying mechanism. These results demonstrate electrical control of an emergent insulating phase in a low-dimensional moiré system, and highlight that layer polarization and layer-selective coupling in multi-band moiré heterostructures provide a powerful route for engineering topological and correlated phases through band structure reconstruction and electron interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了hBN与ABA堆叠三层石墨烯（TLG）形成的莫尔超晶格，发现通过垂直位移场调控层极化，可以驱动系统从多带态演变为有效单带态，并在空穴掺杂次级狄拉克点处伴随金属-绝缘体转变。这种转变源于载流子在石墨烯层间的重新分布，选择性地增强了与莫尔势的耦合。量子电容测量和理论计算证实了能隙的打开，揭示了层选择性耦合是底层机制。
AI.motivation: 探索在多层带系统中，莫尔势不仅是微扰，而是用于杂化TLG中无质量和有质量电子扇区的工具，并研究通过位移场调控实现能带结构重构和量子相变的可能性。
AI.method: 使用垂直位移场调控层极化，结合量子电容测量和理论计算，分析能带结构演化、态密度变化以及金属-绝缘体转变。
AI.result: 系统从多带态演变为有效单带态，伴随金属-绝缘体转变；量子电容测量证实了空穴侧次级狄拉克点处态密度被抑制，表明能隙打开；理论计算验证了层选择性耦合是核心机制。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了通过电场控制低维莫尔系统中涌现的绝缘相，并指出层极化和层选择性耦合是多带莫尔异质结中工程化拓扑和关联相的有力途径。

title: Impact of capacity volatility and input substitutability on supply chain resilience
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures in the main text, and 3 figures in the appendices
summary: Supply chains are intrinsically vulnerable to stochastic shocks due to their sequential production dependencies. Building on the Feld-Barthelemy framework, we investigate how capacity volatility and input substitutability determine critical demands in stochastic supply chains. By modeling production capacity with a truncated normal distribution, we show that in long supply chains, reducing capacity volatility is often more effective than increasing average capacity, emphasizing the need for firm-level synchronization. Furthermore, introducing a modified Leontief-type production function reveals that input substitutability effectively disperses stochastic shocks. Supplier diversification inherently raises critical demands, even under fixed maximum capacities, by introducing the effect of network topology that independently enhances the resilience of physical stock. Our findings demonstrate that mitigating capacity volatility and structurally diversifying supply routes are just as crucial to supply chain resilience as traditional inventory expansion.

AI.tldr: 本文研究随机供应链中产能波动和投入替代性对关键需求的影响，发现降低产能波动比提高平均产能更有效，投入替代性可分散随机冲击，供应商多元化通过网络拓扑效应增强供应链韧性。
AI.motivation: 供应链因其顺序生产依赖性而天然易受随机冲击影响，现有研究对产能波动和投入替代性在供应链韧性中的作用理解不足。
AI.method: 基于Feld-Barthelemy框架，采用截断正态分布建模产能，并引入修正的Leontief型生产函数分析投入替代性效应。
AI.result: 长期供应链中降低产能波动比增加平均产能更有效；投入替代性可分散随机冲击；供应商多元化通过网络拓扑效应独立增强物理库存韧性。
AI.conclusion: 缓解产能波动和结构性地多样化供应路线与传统库存扩张同等重要，是提升供应链韧性的关键。

title: Bootstrap bounds for Quantum Spin Systems using String Operators
summary: Bootstrap is a numerical many-body method that provides rigorous bounds on ground-state observables by imposing a set of necessary constraints on the expectation values of operators. The quality of the resulting bounds is sensitive to the choice of operators entering the constraints. In particular, bounds on ground-state correlations are often loose in spontaneous symmetry-breaking (SSB) phases, since local operator sets cannot exclude domain-wall excitations. In this work, we introduce non-local, string-like operators into the bootstrap and show that the program can be formulated directly in thermodynamic limit. We then apply our construction to several 1D spin models. First, we obtain a significant tightening of the bounds in the SSB phase of the 1D transverse-field Ising model. Using the 1D axial next-nearest-neighbor Ising model, we further show that this tightening allows for a quantitative estimate of the locations of phase boundaries. Finally, we generalize the string operators to the 1D $\mathbb{Z}_3$ chiral clock model and track the behavior of the bounds across the phase diagram. Our results broaden the class of constraints available to the bootstrap and open a route toward bootstrapping more general symmetry-broken and topological phases, where the relevant constraints may involve non-local or extended operators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将非局域弦算符引入自举法（bootstrap），直接在热力学极限下求解，显著改善了1D自旋模型中自发对称破缺相的约束紧度，并能定量估计相边界位置，为更广泛的对称破缺和拓扑相的自举开辟了新途径。
AI.motivation: 现有自举法在处理自发对称破缺（SSB）相时，由于局域算子集合无法排除畴壁激发，导致基态关联的界过于宽松，需要引入非局域算子来收紧约束。
AI.method: 将非局域弦算符（string-like operators）引入自举框架，并在热力学极限下直接公式化；应用于1D横场Ising模型、1D轴向次近邻Ising模型和1D $\mathbb{Z}_3$ 手征钟模型。
AI.result: (1) 在1D横场Ising模型的SSB相中显著收紧了界的紧度；(2) 在轴向次近邻Ising模型中实现了相边界位置的定量估计；(3) 在$\mathbb{Z}_3$手征钟模型中追踪了相图上界的行为变化。
AI.conclusion: 该工作拓宽了自举法中可用约束的类型，为自举更一般的对称破缺相和拓扑相（涉及非局域或扩展算子）开辟了道路。

title: Distilling first-principles accuracy into compact machine learning potentials for condensed-phase chemistry
summary: Accurate machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have made first-principles-quality potential energy surfaces increasingly accessible for condensed-phase chemistry, but their inference cost can still limit the sampling needed to compute experimentally relevant observables. In this work, we combine transfer learning and knowledge distillation to construct compact "student" models that retain the accuracy of much larger "teacher" models obtained by applying transfer learning to foundation models. The resulting students reduce production simulation cost by roughly an order of magnitude, making high-accuracy sampling practical for challenging condensed-phase problems. We demonstrate this across three problems of increasing sampling complexity: finite-temperature NPT simulations of ice Ih, classical and path-integral simulations of liquid water over 240-370 K, and path-integral umbrella-sampling simulations of water dissociation at the anatase TiO2(101)/water interface. In all cases, the distilled students reproduce the target observables of their teachers more reliably than models of the same size trained directly on the limited reference data. The liquid-water student, distilled from a Δ-learned CCSD(T)-quality teacher, reproduces thermodynamic, structural, transport, and nuclear quantum properties over the full temperature range studied. At the TiO2/water interface, distillation makes PIMD umbrella sampling practical and shows that nuclear quantum effects lower the dissociation barrier by roughly 2 kcal/mol and shift the molecular-dissociated free energy difference into quantitative agreement with recent solid-state 17O NMR measurements. Our work demonstrates how knowledge distillation can make accurate MLIPs practical for the sampling methods needed to connect condensed-phase reaction thermodynamics with experiment, notably for interfacial chemistry and catalysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合迁移学习与知识蒸馏，从大型教师模型构建紧凑学生模型，在不损失精度的前提下将模拟成本降低约一个数量级，并在冰、液态水及TiO2/水界面三个挑战性体系中验证了该方法的高效性与准确性。
AI.motivation: 机器学习原子间势能（MLIPs）虽已能逼近第一性原理精度，但其推理成本仍然限制了获取实验可观测量所需的充分采样，亟需一种既能保持精度又能降低计算成本的方法。
AI.method: 将迁移学习（用于构建大教师模型）与知识蒸馏（将教师知识压缩至小模型）相结合，产生紧凑学生模型；在液态水体系中利用Δ-学习获得CCSD(T)级教师模型，并通过PIMD伞形采样处理界面反应。
AI.result: 学生模型将生产模拟成本降低约一个数量级；在冰的NPT模拟、液态水240-370K经典与路径积分模拟、TiO2/水界面解离模拟中，均比同规模直接训练的模型更可靠；核量子效应使解离势垒降低约2 kcal/mol，自由能差与固态17O NMR定量吻合。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏使高精度MLIPs在需要大量采样的凝聚相模拟中变得实用，尤其适用于界面化学与催化反应热力学与实验的对接。

title: Prolate spheroidal wave functions enable fast and exponent-aware long-range machine learning interatomic potentials
summary: Long-range interactions such as electrostatics and dispersion remain a central bottleneck for machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs), especially in ionic, polar and interfacial systems. Ewald-based reciprocal-space mechanisms provide a physically grounded route for capturing these nonlocal effects, but often require dense Fourier grids and can become memory-limited at scale. This problem is particularly pronounced in molecular dynamics, where high efficiency requirements make accurate long-range modelling particularly costly. Here we introduce PSWF-LR, an exponent-aware long-range framework based on prolate spheroidal wave functions (PSWFs) that can be easily incorporated into existing model architectures. Its core components are PSWF-based mollification and atom-grid spreading, which enable compact and efficient representation of arbitrary inverse-power channels $1/r^p$ while treating the decay exponent as a physical prior. Across diverse long-range benchmarks, PSWF-LR reduces Fourier-mode requirements, improves energy and force accuracy, accelerates production-level simulations by about threefold, and extends long-range MLIP simulations beyond the memory limits of conventional MLIPs.

AI.tldr: PSWF-LR是一种基于长椭球波函数的长程作用框架，通过模糊化和原子-网格扩散技术高效表示任意逆幂通道1/r^p，在保持物理先验的同时显著降低傅里叶模式需求、提升能量和力精度，并实现约三倍的模拟加速，突破了传统机器学习原子间势在长程相互作用中的内存限制。
AI.motivation: 静电和色散等长程相互作用是机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）的核心瓶颈，尤其在离子、极性和界面体系中。现有的基于Ewald倒易空间机制的方法需要密集的傅里叶网格，在大规模分子动力学模拟中面临内存限制和高计算成本的问题。
AI.method: PSWF-LR框架基于长椭球波函数（PSWFs），包含两个核心组件：PSWF-based mollification（模糊化）和atom-grid spreading（原子-网格扩散），能够紧凑高效地表示任意逆幂通道1/r^p，并将衰减指数作为物理先验引入模型。
AI.result: 在多种长程基准测试中，PSWF-LR减少了傅里叶模式需求，提高了能量和力的精度，在生产级模拟中实现了约三倍的加速，并将长程MLIP模拟扩展到传统MLIPs内存限制之外。
AI.conclusion: PSWF-LR框架有效解决了MLIPs中长程相互作用的效率和内存瓶颈问题，可轻松集成到现有模型架构中，为离子、极性和界面体系的高效长程建模提供了新途径。

title: Element-Specific Solute Trapping and Grain Structure Evolution during Laser Powder Bed Fusion of Multicomponent Alloys
summary: Under the rapid solidification conditions of laser powder bed fusion (LPBF), solute trapping manifests in an element-specific manner, altering nonequilibrium partitioning, constitutional undercooling, and grain selection behavior in multicomponent alloys. Here, we elucidate the mechanisms by which element-specific solute trapping governs nucleation behavior and grain structure evolution during LPBF demonstrated on a SS316L. This requires quantitative description of nonequilibrium multicomponent thermodynamics and grain evolution across broad LPBF solidification conditions, which is achieved through a CALPHAD-informed Gaussian Process Regression (GPR)-assisted Phase-Field (PF) approach. The predicted transitions in grain morphology and grain size are validated against EBSD measurements under multiple LPBF processing conditions. Results demonstrate that increasing solidification rate drives a composition-dependent transition from solute diffusion-controlled nucleation to solute trapping-controlled grain growth, where nonequilibrium solute redistribution intensified by solute trapping suppresses equiaxed grain formation despite high cooling rates. Quantitative decomposition of multicomponent undercooling further reveals distinct element-specific sensitivities to solute trapping, where C, Cr, and Mo remain dominant contributors to the overall undercooling, while the undercooling contribution of low-partitioning elements such as S and P are strongly suppressed relative to their equilibrium values under rapid solidification conditions. These results reveal how element-specific solute trapping governs grain selection in multicomponent alloys, providing a mechanistic basis for alloy design under nonequilibrium solidification conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过CALPHAD结合高斯过程回归辅助的相场方法，揭示了激光粉末床熔融（LPBF）过程中元素特异性溶质捕获如何影响多元合金（以SS316L为例）的成核行为和晶粒结构演化，发现高凝固速率下溶质捕获抑制等轴晶形成，且不同元素（C、Cr、Mo vs. S、P）对过冷度的贡献存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: LPBF快速凝固条件下，溶质捕获具有元素特异性，影响多元合金的非平衡分配、成分过冷和晶粒选择行为，但目前缺乏对这些机制的定量理解。
AI.method: 采用CALPHAD-informed Gaussian Process Regression (GPR)辅助的Phase-Field (PF)方法，定量描述LPBF宽凝固条件下的非平衡多元热力学和晶粒演化，并通过EBSD测量验证。
AI.result: 1) 凝固速率增加引发从溶质扩散控制成核到溶质捕获控制晶粒生长的转变；2) 溶质捕获增强的非平衡溶质再分配抑制等轴晶形成；3) C、Cr、Mo是过冷度的主要贡献者，而低分配元素S、P的过冷贡献被强烈抑制。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了元素特异性溶质捕获如何控制多元合金的晶粒选择，为非平衡凝固条件下的合金设计提供了机理基础。

title: Charge density waves and enhanced superconductivity in the electron-hole gas: a plausible, simple, physically intuitive model
summary: A neutral degenerate plasma of equal numbers of electrons and positively charged fermions (holes) -- the electron-hole gas -- is studied using a simple, physically motivated two-parameter model (density r_s and mass ratio M/m). Two simplifying assumptions are made but not proven: the electron-hole correlation energy is approximately independent of density and does not affect the pressure or bulk modulus, and the electron-hole contribution to the local field factors is zero, allowing use of the known electron-gas local field factors. With these assumptions the phase diagram, instabilities, and effective interactions can be calculated for all mass ratios and densities using simple formulae, reproducible on a laptop. The key new physics is the additional screening provided by the mobile holes. A single function Delta appears in the denominator of all effective interactions and response functions. Near the zeros of Delta at q = 0 (compressibility instability) and at finite q, three phenomena are simultaneously enhanced: charge density waves (for M/m >= 4.97), a large T^2 electrical resistivity from electron-hole scattering, and an attractive electron-electron interaction that is the purely electronic analog of BCS electron-phonon coupling. Crudely estimated superconducting transition temperatures approach room temperature, reaching approximately 275 K at M/m = 9. No claim is made that this model applies to any specific material. The aim is to provoke scrutiny of the assumptions, calculation of the unknown local field factors, and investigation of whether this minimal two-carrier framework maps onto real systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了电子-空穴气体（中性简并等离子体）的相图、不稳定性及有效相互作用，发现当质量比M/m ≥ 4.97时，电荷密度波、电阻率和吸引性电子-电子相互作用同时增强，并粗略估计超导转变温度可达~275 K（M/m=9），但作者声明该模型不特定适用于任何具体材料，旨在激发对假设的检验和实际系统的映射研究。
AI.motivation: 探索双载流子（电子和空穴）体系中的新奇物理现象，尤其是空穴的移动性带来的额外屏蔽效应如何影响体系的相变、电荷密度波、电阻率以及可能的超导配对机制。
AI.method: 采用基于密度r_s和质量比M/m的两参数简单模型，假设电子-空穴关联能与密度无关且不影响压力/体模量，并使用已知电子气局域场因子（忽略电子-空穴贡献）。通过单一函数Δ在q=0和有限q处的零点分析压缩率不稳定性、电荷密度波等。
AI.result: 发现当M/m ≥ 4.97时，电荷密度波、大的T²电阻率和吸引性电子-电子相互作用同时增强；粗略估计超导转变温度可达~275 K（M/m=9）。
AI.conclusion: 该模型提供了一个极简的双载流子框架，能够解释多种同时增强的物理现象，并预言了接近室温的超导可能性，但需要进一步检验假设、计算未知局域场因子，并探索实际材料中的映射。

title: Spin SWAP operation in double quantum dots at the LaAlO3/SrTiO3 interface
summary: Progress in the fabrication of nanoscale transition-metal-oxide heterostructures makes these platforms promising candidates for the realization of spin qubits, mainly due to the $d$-character of their electronic structures, which could potentially result in a reduction of hyperfine interactions and spin decoherence. Here, we present a systematic study of spin control within the SWAP operation in double quantum dots embedded in a two-dimensional electron gas at the LaAlO$_3$/SrTiO$_3$ interface. Our analysis starts with a study of single-electron spin dynamics, focusing on the influence of spin-orbit and interorbital coupling on the spin evolution. In this case, our findings are supported by semiclassical calculations based on the Bloch equations, which show good agreement with full quantum mechanical simulations. We then simulate the SWAP operation by analyzing the crossover between two regimes: (i) large quantum dots, where the electronic structure is dominated by the $d_{xy}$ orbitals and the spin dynamics is affected primarily by Rashba-type spin-orbit interaction; and (ii) small quantum dots, where higher-energy orbitals $d_{xz/yz}$ contribute to the electronic structure, leading to a significant reduction in the SWAP fidelity. In the first regime, particularly relevant from the application point of view, we analyze in detail the anisotropy of the SWAP operation induced by the spin-orbit coupling.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了LaAlO₃/SrTiO₃界面双量子点中SWAP操作的电子自旋控制，分析了自旋-轨道耦合和轨道间耦合对自旋动力学的影响，并揭示了量子点尺寸（大/小）导致的两类自旋交换行为差异，其中大量子点（dxy轨道主导）的SWAP操作存在显著各向异性。
AI.motivation: 纳米尺度过渡金属氧化物异质结因其d轨道电子结构可能减弱超精细相互作用和自旋退相干，有望实现自旋量子比特，因此需要系统研究此类平台中的自旋控制机制。
AI.method: 从单电子自旋动力学入手，结合Bloch方程的半经典计算与全量子力学模拟；进一步分析双量子点SWAP操作，对比大量子点（dxy轨道主导、Rashba自旋-轨道耦合为主）与小量子点（dxz/yz轨道参与）两种情形。
AI.result: 半经典Bloch方程与全量子模拟结果吻合良好；小量子点中高能轨道参与导致SWAP保真度显著下降；大量子点中SWAP操作存在由自旋-轨道耦合诱导的各向异性。
AI.conclusion: LaAlO₃/SrTiO₃界面双量子点在大量子点（dxy主导）条件下更适合实现高保真度SWAP操作，但需考虑自旋-轨道耦合带来的各向异性效应。

title: A Machine-Learning Based Approach to the Evaluation of the Critical Scaling Behavior of Anisotropic Spin Systems
summary: Computational models adequately representing phase transitions and evaluating the critical system parameters are essential for the understanding of the properties of a wide range of materials. Here we propose a machine learning (ML)-based approach to the identification of the critical point in anisotropic spin systems. Our approach implies training of a convolutional neural network (CNN) model from the correlation matrices obtained by Monte Carlo simulations. Next, the pretrained model is employed as a fast estimator of the critical temperature, which can be extracted in several complementary ways from the CNN model inference, this way improving the robustness of the analysis. The ML-based estimates obtained in this study are in very good agreement with the reference Monte Carlo simulation results, while computational costs are about 10x lower compared to the classical thermodynamic approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于机器学习（CNN）的方法，通过蒙特卡洛模拟生成的相关矩阵训练模型，快速估计各向异性自旋系统的临界温度，计算成本降低约10倍，结果与参考方法高度一致。
AI.motivation: 准确描述相变和评估临界系统参数对于理解广泛材料的性质至关重要，传统热力学方法计算成本高，需要更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 使用蒙特卡洛模拟生成相关矩阵，训练卷积神经网络（CNN）模型；利用预训练模型通过多种互补方式快速估计临界温度。
AI.result: ML估计值与参考蒙特卡洛模拟结果高度吻合，计算成本比传统热力学方法降低约10倍。
AI.conclusion: 基于CNN的机器学习方法能够高效、鲁棒地识别各向异性自旋系统的临界点，在保持精度的同时大幅降低计算成本。

title: Tensor network study of deconfined quantum criticality in a one-dimensional spin-phonon model
summary: Deconfined quantum critical points (DQCPs) describe continuous transitions between ordered phases beyond the Landau paradigm. A simple example is the Néel antiferromagnet (AFM) to valence bond solid (VBS) transition in a 1D antiferromagnetic $J_1-J_2$ model. In analogy to the spin-Peierls instability of critical spin chains, DQCPs are predicted to be unstable towards lattice distortions below a critical phonon frequency. In this work, we use tensor network simulations to investigate this instability in the antiferromagnetic $J_1-J_2$ model coupled to lattice vibrations. We confirm the stability of DQCP for large phonon frequencies and demonstrate that the transition turns strongly first-order below a critical frequency. The instability is caused by a reduction of the Luttinger parameter due to spin-phonon interactions and we identify the effective theory of the behavior as the double sine-Gordon model. The same effective theory is known to describe the classical Ashkin-Teller model, which enables us to show that the critical endpoint is in the four-state Potts universality class. Furthermore, we provide quantitative numerical scaling results for the phonon spectral function, offering an experimental signature to probe DQCP-phonon coupling in low-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过张量网络模拟研究了一维J1-J2反铁磁模型与晶格振动耦合下，去禁闭量子临界点(DQCP)对声子扰动的稳定性，发现当声子频率低于临界值时，DQCP会从连续相变转变为强一级相变，其临界端点属于四态Potts普适类。
AI.motivation: DQCP被认为可能对晶格畸变（声子）不稳定，类似于自旋-佩尔斯不稳定性，但缺乏定量验证。
AI.method: 使用张量网络模拟研究J1-J2反铁磁模型与晶格振动耦合，分析声子频率对DQCP稳定性的影响，并用双sine-Gordon模型（经典Ashkin-Teller模型）描述有效理论。
AI.result: 高频声子下DQCP稳定；低于临界频率时转变为强一级相变；临界端点属于四态Potts普适类；给出了声子谱函数的定量标度结果。
AI.conclusion: 声子耦合会通过降低Luttinger参数导致DQCP失稳，提供了低维材料中探测DQCP-声子耦合的实验可观测信号。

title: Six Open Questions in Machine-Learned Interatomic Potential Foundation Models
summary: Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have had a profound impact on molecular modelling in recent years, promising to resolve the long-standing tension between the scale and accuracy of simulations. There has been a proliferation of new models and designs, and recently the paradigm of ``foundational'' MLIPs has become prevalent. Broadly speaking, foundation models are trained on large diverse datasets and promise to work well for new systems with minimal updates required. However, in such a new and fast moving field, there are many unanswered questions. In this article, we set out to articulate and explore what we see as the most important among these questions. We start by developing a working definition for foundational MLIPs and use this definition to frame the subsequent open questions. Despite the rapid progress in the field of MLIP models, we believe that these are fundamental questions which will continue to define cutting edge research in MLIPs in the years to come.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）领域中基础模型的定义与关键未解决问题，指出尽管该领域发展迅速，但仍存在许多根本性挑战需要回答。
AI.motivation: MLIPs在分子建模中取得了巨大进展，尤其是"基础模型"范式兴起，承诺用大规模多样化数据集训练出适用于新系统的通用模型。但该领域发展过快，许多根本性问题尚未被清晰阐述和探索。
AI.method: 文章首先为"基础MLIPs"制定了一个工作定义，然后以此定义为基础，框定并探讨了一系列未解决的关键问题。
AI.result: 识别并阐述了基础MLIPs领域中最重要的一系列开放性问题，为未来研究指明了方向。
AI.conclusion: 尽管MLIP模型进展迅猛，但这些根本性问题将持续定义该领域的尖端研究，是未来几年需要重点关注的方向。

title: Temperature-Induced Crossover of Coherent Phonon Mechanisms in Chiral 2D Perovskites
summary: The coupling between electronic excitations and lattice degrees of freedom fundamentally dictates the optoelectronic functionality of hybrid perovskites. While the potential energy surfaces (PESs) of the electronic excited states are typically considered static, albeit modulated by thermal disorder, the exact nature of their structural evolution with temperature remains elusive. Here, we demonstrate that the excited-state structural reconfiguration in two-dimensional metal-halide perovskites is explicitly temperature-evolving, governed by lattice compliance. We select a chiral perovskite framework with an exceptionally large, temperature-dependent bond angle variance to maximize the structural compliance. Through phase-resolved resonant impulsive stimulated Raman scattering, we measure the coherent phonon dynamics and resolve the real-time structural pathways of exciton-lattice dressing. We observe a temperature-induced crossover from field-driven Impulsive Stimulated Raman Scattering (ISRS) to population-driven Displacive Excitation of Coherent Phonons (DECP). While momentum-driven ISRS pathways dominate at low temperatures, increasing thermal energy softens the lattice and enhances coordinate-driven displacive pathways, allowing excitons to sample steeper, highly anharmonic regions of the excited-state PES. Our results show that temperature can actively modulate the excited-state structural coordinates of flexible 2D frameworks, offering a practical strategy to tune exciton-lattice interactions in chiral optoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维金属卤化物钙钛矿中激发态结构重组随温度演化的机制，发现晶格柔顺性决定了激发态势能面的结构演化，并观察到从ISRS到DECP的温度诱导交叉行为。
AI.motivation: 虽然电子激发态势能面通常被认为是静态的（仅受热无序调制），但其随温度的结构演化本质尚不清楚。
AI.method: 选择具有大温度依赖性键角方差的手性钙钛矿框架以最大化结构柔顺性，通过相位分辨共振脉冲受激拉曼散射测量相干声子动力学，解析激子-晶格耦合的实时结构路径。
AI.result: 观察到温度诱导的从场驱动的ISRS到种群驱动的DECP的交叉；低温下动量驱动的ISRS占主导，而升温软化晶格并增强坐标驱动的位移路径，使激子探索更陡峭、高度非简谐的激发态势能面区域。
AI.conclusion: 温度可主动调控柔性二维框架的激发态结构坐标，为手性光电子学中调节激子-晶格相互作用提供了实用策略。

title: Magnetic Field Walls in Flat-band Superconductors
summary: Superconductors of different types have distinct magnetic properties; for example, they can form Abrikosov vortices or alternating normal-superconducting domains. We predict that, in flat bands, a superconducting phase exhibiting walls of magnetic flux is stable in an applied magnetic field. This phase relies on the lack of a single particle energy penalty for forming condensates of any momentum in flat bands and, consequently, their superconducting free energy being a negative and periodic function of the vector potential at low temperatures. Using a minimal lattice-periodic model of free energy, we study two types of soliton modes of the wall phase: the kink and breather solitons. They determine the lower critical field and the high-field behavior of the wall phase, respectively. The competition between the walls and vortices in flat bands is also discussed. Our results suggest that flat bands help sustain superconductivity in the presence of large magnetic fields.

AI.tldr: 本文预测在平带超导体中，外加磁场下会形成一种具有磁通壁的稳定超导相，该相依赖于平带中自由能随矢势的周期性变化，并讨论了扭结和呼吸子两种孤子模式及其对临界场的影响。
AI.motivation: 探索平带超导体在外加磁场中的独特磁性行为，特别是不同于传统涡旋态或畴壁的新型磁通壁超导相。
AI.method: 基于平带超导自由能随矢势周期性变化的特性，构建最小晶格周期自由能模型，研究磁通壁相的扭结和呼吸子孤子解。
AI.result: 确认了磁通壁超导相的稳定性；扭结孤子决定下临界场，呼吸子孤子决定高场行为；讨论了壁相与涡旋相的竞争关系。
AI.conclusion: 平带有助于在大磁场下维持超导性，磁通壁相为平带超导体在磁场中的行为提供了新的理论框架。

title: Light-tunable quantum metric non-linear Hall response in Berry dipole semimetals
summary: We investigate the effect of light on quantum metric-mediated intrinsic nonlinear Hall conductivity in Berry dipole semimetals. We discover that light induces a tunable asymmetry in the off-diagonal part of the quantum metric, which is manifested by an asymmetry in the quantum metric dipole. We show that the nonlinear response can be tuned directly by the light amplitude. In particular, we note that the direction of the nonlinear Hall signal changes when the light amplitude is increased beyond a threshold value. Light thus emerges as a promising stimulus to control the quantum geometric response in topological semimetals.

AI.tldr: 研究光对Berry偶极半金属中量子度规介导的非线性霍尔电导的影响，发现光可调控量子度规的非对称性，进而调控非线性霍尔信号的方向。
AI.motivation: 探索光作为外场刺激对量子度规介导的非线性霍尔效应的调控能力，特别是在拓扑半金属中的量子几何响应。
AI.method: 理论分析光对Berry偶极半金属中量子度规非对角部分的调控，研究光振幅对非线性霍尔电导的影响。
AI.result: 光可诱导量子度规非对角部分的可调非对称性，表现为量子度规偶极子的非对称性；非线性霍尔信号的方向在光振幅超过阈值时发生反转。
AI.conclusion: 光是一种有前景的调控拓扑半金属中量子几何响应的手段，可实现非线性霍尔效应的方向控制。

title: Fate of the Ising universality class under nonreciprocal interactions
summary: We study the critical behavior of a two-dimensional Ising model with nonreciprocal vision-cone interactions, which explicitly violate reciprocity and detailed balance. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations and dynamic renormalization-group analysis show that the asymptotic critical exponents remain fully consistent with the equilibrium Ising universality class over a broad range of nonreciprocal coupling strengths $λ$. In contrast, dimensionless quantities such as the Binder cumulant and the correlation-length ratio display pronounced anisotropic nonequilibrium corrections and systematically deviate from their equilibrium Ising values. The renormalization-group flow further demonstrates that the nonreciprocal perturbation is irrelevant at the Wilson-Fisher fixed point while generating a finite shift of the critical temperature proportional to $λ^2$. Our results demonstrate the remarkable robustness of two-dimensional Ising criticality against this class of directional interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有非互易视锥相互作用的二维伊辛模型的临界行为，发现尽管非互易性破坏了互易性和细致平衡，但渐近临界指数仍与平衡伊辛普适类一致，而非量纲量出现各向异性非平衡修正，且非互易扰动在Wilson-Fisher不动点处无关，仅导致临界温度的有限平移。
AI.motivation: 探究非互易（非平衡）相互作用是否以及如何改变二维伊辛模型的临界普适类，验证平衡临界理论在非平衡系统中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用大规模蒙特卡洛模拟和动态重正化群分析，系统研究不同非互易耦合强度下的临界行为，包括临界指数、Binder累积量、关联长度比等量。
AI.result: 1. 临界指数与平衡伊辛普适类一致；2. 非量纲量（Binder累积量、关联长度比）出现各向异性非平衡偏移；3. RG流显示非互易扰动在Wilson-Fisher不动点处为无关量；4. 临界温度平移量正比于λ²。
AI.conclusion: 二维伊辛模型的临界性对此类方向性非互易相互作用表现出显著的鲁棒性，非互易性主要影响非普适量（如临界温度）和非量纲量的有限尺寸行为，而不改变普适类。

title: Field-rigid Ising antiferromagnetism with giant spin-flip fields in Van der Waals UOTe
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures; Supplemental Material: 6 pages, 17 figures
summary: Van der Waals antiferromagnets provide a route to thickness-controlled magnetic order, but few combine high-temperature Ising order with conducting, correlated, and topological electronic structure. Here we show that UOTe realizes this combination. Magnetic susceptibility reveals a strongly anisotropic paramagnetic response, while neutron diffraction establishes c-axis antiferromagnetic order below $T_N \simeq 150$ K with an order-parameter exponent $β= 0.14$, close to the two-dimensional Ising value. Torque magnetometry further shows that the ordered state remains well described by a uniaxial antiferromagnet below the high-field transition. Pulsed-field magnetization up to 73 T shows that the ordered state survives to very large fields applied along the c axis before entering a broad metamagnetic regime that begins near 50 T, and remains unsaturated at the highest measured field. Angle-dependent proximity detector oscillator measurements show that the metamagnetic instability is set by the field component along the ordered moment direction, providing direct evidence for Ising-like field rigidity. UOTe therefore establishes a field-rigid Ising antiferromagnet with giant spin-flip fields in a compensated Van der Waals metal, where high-temperature c-axis order, quasi-two-dimensional magnetic criticality, Kondo-associated uranium 5f hybridization, metallic transport, and symmetry-enabled topology coexist in a single material.

AI.tldr: 本文发现UOTe是一种结合了高温伊辛反铁磁序、导电性、关联电子和拓扑电子结构的范德瓦尔斯材料，具有强场刚性和准二维伊辛临界行为。
AI.motivation: 范德瓦尔斯反铁磁材料很少能同时兼具高温伊辛磁序、导电性、关联性和拓扑电子结构，作者旨在寻找能实现这一组合的材料。
AI.method: 通过磁化率测量、中子衍射、扭矩磁强计、脉冲场磁化（最高73 T）以及角度依赖的邻近探测器振荡测量等手段，系统表征了UOTe的磁性行为。
AI.result: UOTe在TN≈150 K下表现出c轴反铁磁序，序参量指数β=0.14（接近二维伊辛值）；沿c轴方向磁场下，磁有序在高达~50 T时才进入变磁态，且至73 T仍未饱和；变磁不稳定性由沿磁矩方向的场分量决定，证实伊辛型场刚性。
AI.conclusion: UOTe是一种兼具高温c轴伊辛反铁磁序、准二维磁临界性、Kondo关联5f杂化、金属输运和对称性允许拓扑性质的补偿型范德瓦尔斯金属，为多自由度耦合提供了理想平台。

title: B-Spline for Self-Consistent Field Theory with a Z-Dependent Pauli Potential for Atomic Binding Energies
summary: Polymer self-consistent field theory (SCFT) has recently been established as a promising alternative framework to Kohn-Sham density functional theory (KS-DFT) for modeling quantum many-body systems. It uses real-valued propagators instead of orbitals, simplifying the self-consistent numerical solution. However, SCFT suffers from inaccuracies in heavy-element systems due to the approximate treatment of the Pauli potential, particularly the use of a constant repulsion strength parameter. In this work, we address this central limitation by introducing a Z-dependent Pauli potential that improves agreement with Hartree-Fock (HF) results. Furthermore, we advance SCFT implementation by employing B-spline basis functions-highly localized, piecewise-polynomial functions widely used in atomic structure theory. We demonstrate that B-splines provide a flexible and efficient representation of electronic structure, and present results for atomic binding energies from hydrogen to xenon. Comparisons with HF theory and prior SCFT calculations using Gaussian basis sets highlight the improved accuracy achieved with the Z-dependent potential.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种依赖于原子序数(Z)的Pauli势改进方法，并结合B样条基函数，显著提升了聚合物自洽场理论(SCFT)在重元素体系中的计算精度，从氢到氙的原子结合能计算与Hartree-Fock结果吻合更好。
AI.motivation: SCFT在模拟量子多体系统时，对重元素体系的计算不准确，主要原因是Pauli势的近似处理使用了恒定的排斥强度参数，这限制了SCFT的适用性和精度。
AI.method: 1) 引入依赖于原子序数(Z)的Pauli势，替代原有的恒定排斥强度参数；2) 采用B样条基函数（高度局域化的分段多项式函数）来表示电子结构，替代传统的高斯基组。
AI.result: 从氢到氙的原子结合能计算结果表明，Z-dependent Pauli势显著提高了SCFT与Hartree-Fock结果的一致性，且B样条基函数提供了灵活高效的电子结构表示。
AI.conclusion: 通过Z-dependent Pauli势和B样条基函数的结合，SCFT在重元素体系中的精度得到显著提升，为SCFT作为一种可行的量子多体模拟框架提供了更有力的支持。

title: Matching Terahertz and Hall Mobilities as a Hallmark of Intrinsic Charge Transport in Metal-Halide Perovskites
summary: Charge-carrier transport in soft-lattice materials, including metal-halide perovskites, is often perceived to be highly heterogeneous across different length scales, and influenced by both the intrinsic (dynamic) thermal electronic disorder and extrinsic (static) disorder due to crystal defects, impurities, grain boundaries, and surface states. As a consequence, the reported carrier mobilities obtained by different electrical and optical measurement techniques frequently disagree, raising a critical question: can a truly intrinsic charge transport regime (that is, a regime not dominated by static disorder) extend across macroscopic single crystals of these materials? Here, we demonstrate such a regime in an exemplary metal-halide perovskite system, epitaxial CsPbBr$_{3}$ single crystals, where the local mobility obtained via optical pump-terahertz probe (OPTP) spectroscopy quantitatively agrees with the macroscopic transport mobility across a broad range of experimental conditions. Using a dedicated device platform that enables concurrent Hall-effect and OPTP measurements on the same single-crystalline sample, we obtain consistent room-temperature mobilities of ~ 30 cm$^{2}$V$^{-1}$s$^{-1}$, among the highest reliably reported for CsPbBr$_{3}$. Both techniques reveal band-like temperature dependence of the hole mobility with similar power exponents, confirming that the same intrinsic transport mechanism governs the ultrafast/local and steady-state/macroscopic responses. These results show that defect-free charge transport is achievable in soft-lattice perovskites on millimetre length scales and establish a robust methodology for benchmarking intrinsic mobility in emerging semiconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合光泵太赫兹探针(OPTP)和霍尔效应测量，证明在软晶格钙钛矿CsPbBr₃外延单晶中，局域和宏观电荷传输机制一致，实现了无缺陷的本征输运，室温迁移率约30 cm²V⁻¹s⁻¹。
AI.motivation: 软晶格材料（如金属卤化物钙钛矿）中电荷载流子传输在不同尺度上高度异质，不同测量技术报告的迁移率常相互矛盾，因此关键问题是：材料中是否存在不受静态无序主导的、真正的本征电荷传输机制，且能否扩展至宏观单晶尺度。
AI.method: 制备外延CsPbBr₃单晶，设计专用器件平台，在同一单晶样品上同时进行霍尔效应测量（宏观稳态）和光泵太赫兹探针(OPTP)光谱测量（超快局域），比较两种方法获得的迁移率及温度依赖性。
AI.result: 两种技术获得一致的室温迁移率约30 cm²V⁻¹s⁻¹，为CsPbBr₃最高可靠报告值之一；空穴迁移率均呈现类能带的温度依赖关系，且幂指数相似，证明同一本征传输机制同时主导超快/局域和稳态/宏观响应。
AI.conclusion: 软晶格钙钛矿在毫米尺度上可实现无缺陷的电荷传输，建立了评估新兴半导体本征迁移率的可靠方法。

title: Multiband superconductivity in the kagome-lattice superconductor Re2Zr
comment: 13 pages, 11 figures + Supplemental Material. Accepted in Physical Review B
summary: We present a first-principles investigation of the electronic structure, lattice dynamics, electron-phonon coupling, and superconducting properties of the hexagonal kagome-lattice compound Re$_2$Zr, in which time-reversal symmetry breaking and unconventional pairing have recently been proposed. We examine whether superconductivity in Re$_2$Zr can be explained within a conventional phonon-mediated framework by performing fully ab initio calculations within the density functional theory for superconductors. The electronic structure is characterized by a mixture of seven two- and three-dimensional Fermi surface sheets, giving rise to multiband superconductivity with many overlapping superconducting gaps. A spin-orbit-induced van Hove singularity is identified in the density of states near $E_F$. The electron-phonon interaction is moderately strong, with a coupling constant $λ\simeq 0.88$. Superconducting gap calculations reveal significant anisotropy and a broad distribution of gap values across different Fermi surface sheets. Spin fluctuations introduce additional depairing effects and reduce the critical temperature from 7.7 K to 6.4 K, in excellent agreement with the experimental value of 6.65 K. Taken together, our results show that the superconducting energy scale in Re$_2$Zr can be quantitatively reproduced within a conventional phonon-mediated framework, while the resulting state exhibits pronounced multiband and anisotropic gap structure. The origin of the experimentally suggested time-reversal symmetry breaking, however, remains an open question.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，系统研究了六角Kagome晶格化合物Re₂Zr的电子结构、晶格动力学、电子-声子耦合及超导性质，发现其超导性可在常规声子介导框架内定量解释（Tc约6.4 K），但实验提出的时间反演对称性破缺的起源仍不明确。
AI.motivation: Re₂Zr是一种六角Kagome晶格化合物，近期实验提出其中存在时间反演对称性破缺和非常规配对机制。本文旨在通过第一性原理计算检验该材料的超导性是否可在常规声子介导超导框架内得到解释。
AI.method: 采用基于超导密度泛函理论的完全第一性原理计算，分析电子结构、费米面、自旋-轨道耦合导致的van Hove奇点、电子-声子耦合常数λ，并进行超导能隙计算，同时考虑自旋涨落的去耦效应。
AI.result: 电子结构呈现多带超导特征（7个2D和3D费米面片）；自旋-轨道耦合诱导了费米能级附近的van Hove奇点；电子-声子耦合强度中等（λ≈0.88）；超导能隙存在显著各向异性；自旋涨落将Tc从7.7 K压低至6.4 K，与实验值6.65 K高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: Re₂Zr的超导能标可在常规声子介导框架内定量重现，但其超导态表现出显著的多带和各向异性能隙结构；实验观察到的时间反演对称性破缺的起源仍是一个开放问题。

title: Polar and quadratic magneto-optical Kerr effects in nonmagnetic/ferromagnet bilayers for spin-orbit torque measurements
summary: Recent studies have revealed that spin Hall magnetoresistance (SMR) contributes to both the anomalous and planar Hall resistances in nonmagnetic metal (NM)/ferromagnetic metal (FM) bilayers. This effect becomes pronounced when the NM layer exhibits a large spin Hall angle, as in W/CoFeB bilayers. In such systems, the ratio of planar to anomalous Hall resistances, normally small in single CoFeB layers, can approach unity. This unusually large ratio complicates the determination of spin-torque efficiency using harmonic Hall voltage measurements. To overcome this limitation, magneto-optical Kerr effect (MOKE) measurements have been proposed as an alternative approach. Here, we investigate the polar and quadratic MOKE components, which correspond to, respectively, the anomalous and planar Hall resistances in the low-frequency limit to clarify whether the MOKE measurements are suitable for characterizing the spin-torque efficiency. We find that the ratio of quadratic to polar MOKE signals in NM/FM bilayers is significantly smaller than the corresponding Hall resistance ratio, indicating that SMR contributes negligibly to the MOKE response in the visible range. Consequently, the spin-torque efficiency extracted from MOKE measurements agree well with those expected from the spin Hall angle of the NM layer. These results clarify the reason why MOKE measurements provide reliable determination of the spin-torque efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了W/CoFeB等NM/FM双层膜中，由于自旋霍尔磁电阻(SMR)导致反常霍尔电阻与平面霍尔电阻比值异常增大，从而影响谐波霍尔电压法测量自旋扭矩效率的准确性。作者通过对比MOKE信号与霍尔电阻，发现SMR在可见光波段对MOKE响应贡献极小，因此MOKE测量能可靠地提取自旋扭矩效率。
AI.motivation: 在NM/FM双层膜中，SMR效应使得平面霍尔电阻与反常霍尔电阻的比值接近1，这严重干扰了传统谐波霍尔电压法对自旋扭矩效率的测定。作者希望验证MOKE测量是否能规避SMR的影响，成为一种可靠的替代方案。
AI.method: 作者分别测量了NM/FM双层膜中的极向MOKE（对应反常霍尔电阻）和二次MOKE（对应平面霍尔电阻）信号，并与相应的霍尔电阻测量结果进行对比。通过比较两种信号中二次与极向分量的比值，评估SMR对MOKE响应的贡献程度。
AI.result: 在NM/FM双层膜中，MOKE信号中二次与极向分量的比值远小于对应的霍尔电阻比值，说明SMR在可见光范围内对MOKE响应几乎没有贡献。因此，从MOKE测量中提取的自旋扭矩效率与NM层自旋霍尔角预期的结果一致。
AI.conclusion: MOKE测量能够有效排除SMR的干扰，为自旋扭矩效率提供可靠的测定方法，这解释了为什么MOKE测量在此类体系中优于传统的谐波霍尔电压法。

title: Phase lag enhances synchronization in coupled oscillators with inertia
summary: The second-order Kuramoto model with inertia exhibits different dynamical behaviors than the first-order KM without inertia. A central difference is its lower synchronization due to the emergence of multiple synchronized clusters with different frequencies. We aim to investigate how such lowered synchronization can be improved by applying external perturbations to the system in a steady state, for example, a symmetry-breaking phase lag to a subset of oscillators. We find that this phase lag steers the primary cluster along a specific path and enables it to merge with higher-order clusters, thereby enhancing global synchronization. Our results reveal a mechanism by which controlled phase lag can improve entrainment in inertial oscillator systems, with possible implications for synchronization control in inertial oscillator networks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带惯性的二阶Kuramoto模型中，通过施加对称破缺相位延迟扰动来增强全局同步的机制。
AI.motivation: 二阶Kuramoto模型（带惯性）比一阶模型同步性更低，容易出现多个不同频率的同步簇。作者希望探究如何通过外部扰动（如对部分振子施加相位延迟）来改善这种降低的同步性。
AI.method: 在系统达到稳态后，对部分振子施加对称破缺的相位延迟扰动，观察主簇与高阶簇的合并行为。
AI.result: 相位延迟能够引导主簇沿特定路径移动，并使其与高阶簇合并，从而提升全局同步。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了在惯性振子系统中有控制地引入相位延迟可改善同步的机制，对惯性振子网络的同步控制具有潜在意义。

title: Complex Temperature-dependent Thermal Conductivity in a Sawtooth Chain Magnet Fe$_\mathrm{2}$SiSe$_\mathrm{4}$
summary: Geometrically frustrated magnets provide an ideal platform for exploring the interplay between lattice geometry and spin degrees of freedom. Here, we investigate the interactions between lattice and spin via thermal-transport measurements on the triangular sawtooth-lattice olivine magnet Fe$_\mathrm{2}$SiSe$_\mathrm{4}$, which exhibits successive magnetic transitions at $T_1 = 110$ K (antiferromagnetic) and $T_2 = 50$ K (ferrimagnetic). Although phonons dominate the thermal conductivity, its temperature dependence displays a pronounced double-peak structure arising from spin-phonon coupling. In the intermediate temperature range between $T_1$ and $T_2$ , resonant scattering of phonons by magnetic excitations around 5 meV produces a broad maximum around 60 K. Below $T_2$, the resonant spin-phonon scattering is strongly suppressed, leading to a rapid increase in thermal conductivity upon cooling and a pronounced low-temperature peak near 11 K, characteristic of heat transport governed by conventional phonon scattering mechanisms. Notably, this low-temperature peak is enhanced by a factor of $\sim 5$ compared to the broad maximum at higher temperatures. These results demonstrate the strong sensitivity of thermal transport to spin-lattice interactions and highlight spin-phonon scattering as an effective mechanism for tailoring thermal conductivity in geometrically frustrated magnets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过热输运测量研究了三角锯齿晶格橄榄石磁体Fe₂SiSe₄中自旋-声子耦合效应，发现了由自旋-声子共振散射导致的双峰热导率结构，其中低温峰值比高温峰值高出约5倍，揭示了自旋-晶格相互作用对热输运的显著调控能力。
AI.motivation: 探索几何阻挫磁体中晶格几何与自旋自由度之间的相互作用，特别是自旋-声子耦合对热输运行为的影响机制。
AI.method: 对三角锯齿晶格橄榄石磁体Fe₂SiSe₄进行热输运测量，在110 K（反铁磁转变）和50 K（亚铁磁转变）两个磁有序温度区间内分析热导率的温度依赖性。
AI.result: 热导率呈现明显的双峰结构：在T₁和T₂之间（约60 K附近），5 meV磁激发对声子产生共振散射形成宽峰；在T₂以下，共振散射被抑制，热导率快速上升并在11 K附近出现尖锐低温峰，该峰值比高温峰高出约5倍。
AI.conclusion: 热输运对自旋-晶格相互作用高度敏感，自旋-声子散射可作为一种有效机制来调控几何阻挫磁体中的热导率。

title: Static Effective Hamiltonians for Molecular Systems through RPA-based downfolding
summary: Green's function-based downfolding methods construct effective Hamiltonians of reduced dimension that capture dynamical correlations of an electronic environment through effective potentials acting on the active space only. Using methods based on the constrained random phase approximation (cRPA) and moment RPA (mRPA), we construct static effective Hamiltonians that include screening through the environment. We derive expressions for the energy contribution from the environment and for the effective one- and two-body terms, taking into account double-counting corrections. cRPA requires additional consideration due to its frequency dependence, while mRPA provides a static Hamiltonian by construction. For the ground state energy of benzene and bond dissociation curves, we discuss the differences and similarities between the different flavors of RPA-based screening. We show that downfolding using cRPA describes both dynamical and strong correlation well, while mRPA and cRPA restricted to screening the particle-hole matrix elements can fail to describe bond dissociation due to a dominating dynamical correlation term. In the static limit, these two methods are shown to be almost indistinguishable.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于格林函数的downfolding方法，通过cRPA和mRPA两种方法构建有效哈密顿量，并分析了它们在描述动态关联和强关联方面的差异。研究发现，cRPA能同时良好描述动态和强关联，而mRPA在键解离描述上可能失败。
AI.motivation: 传统downfolding方法难以同时捕捉电子环境的动态关联和强关联效应，需要开发更有效的有效哈密顿量构建方法。
AI.method: 采用cRPA（约束随机相位近似）和mRPA（矩随机相位近似）两种方法构建静态有效哈密顿量，推导了环境能量贡献和有效单双体能项的表达式，并考虑了双计数修正。
AI.result: cRPA能同时良好描述动态关联和强关联；mRPA及仅屏蔽粒子-空穴矩阵元的cRPA在键解离描述上可能失败；在静态极限下，两种方法几乎无法区分。
AI.conclusion: 基于频率依赖的cRPA在描述键解离等强关联场景中优于静态近似方法，表明动态关联项对准确描述强关联体系至关重要。

title: Symmetry-Protected Phonon Topology and Low Lattice Thermal Conductivity in Square-Octagonal Chalcogenides
summary: Unconventional lattice geometries provide an effective platform for realizing symmetry-protected topological phonon states that can strongly influence lattice heat transport. In this work, we explore the relationship between topological phonon band features and thermal transport in square--octagonal (so) chalcogenide monolayers, namely MoS2 and SnS, by combining first-principles calculations with phonon Boltzmann transport theory. Symmetry analysis reveals the presence of nontrivial phonon band topology in the form of symmetry-protected nodal lines. Crossings between nodal lines carrying different symmetry eigenvalues produce fourfold Dirac points that enhance the phonon group velocity (vg), whereas nearly flat nodal lines lead to strong suppression of vg. The coexistence of these features, together with substantial phonon softening and enhanced anharmonic scattering around the topological band crossings, markedly suppresses the lattice thermal conductivity ($κ_l$). As a result, room-temperature $κ_l$ values of 4.0 W/mK for so-SnS and 18.7 W/mK for so-MoS2 are obtained, representing reductions by more than a factor of two and eight, respectively, relative to their hexagonal phases. Our results uncover a direct connection between phonon band topology and heat transport in two-dimensional materials, highlighting lattice symmetry and topological band engineering as promising routes for tailoring thermal properties. These findings further suggest opportunities for designing topological phononic and thermoelectric devices with controllable heat flow.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算和声子玻尔兹曼输运理论，研究了方八边形（so）硫族化物单层（MoS2和SnS）中拓扑声子带特征与热输运之间的关系。发现对称性保护节点线和四重狄拉克点等拓扑声子带特征显著抑制了晶格热导率，so-SnS和so-MoS2的室温热导率分别比其六方相降低了2倍和8倍以上，揭示了声子带拓扑与热输运之间的直接联系。
AI.motivation: 探索非常规晶格几何中拓扑声子态对晶格热输运的影响机制，建立声子带拓扑与热传导之间的直接联系。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理计算与声子玻尔兹曼输运理论，对方八边形MoS2和SnS单层进行对称性分析和拓扑声子能带结构计算。
AI.result: 发现对称性保护节点线和四重狄拉克点共存：四重狄拉克点增强声子群速度，而平坦节点线强烈抑制群速度。同时拓扑能带交叉处存在声子软化与增强的非简谐散射。室温下so-SnS热导率为4.0 W/mK（降低>2倍），so-MoS2为18.7 W/mK（降低>8倍）。
AI.conclusion: 直接揭示了二维材料中声子带拓扑与热输运的关联，提出晶格对称性和拓扑能带工程是调控热性能的有效途径，为设计拓扑声子学和热电器件提供了新思路。

title: Bulk Superconductivity driven by Disorder-Induced Delocalization in 4Hb-Ta(S$_{1-x}$Se$_x$)$_2$
comment: 17 pages, 5 figures in the main text
summary: The unconventional superconductor 4Hb-TaS$_2$ is a natural heterostructure that can be broadly understood as interleaving Mott-like and metallic layers. We study the properties of this material as a function of quenched disorder in the form of Se/S substitution and find that while disordered samples show bulk superconductivity, clean samples do not. We show that a disorder-driven delocalization of carriers in the Mott-like ($1T$-) layer forms a new Fermi surface that is absent in the cleanest samples. This suggests that one of the primary drivers for superconductivity is the fragility of the Mott state, whose delocalization brings to life a sea of strongly correlated electrons.

AI.tldr: 4Hb-TaS₂的超导性需要Se/S替代引入的无序来破坏Mott绝缘层，从而创造出新的费米面和强关联电子海。
AI.motivation: 探究4Hb-TaS₂这一自然异质结构中，Mott绝缘层与金属层之间的相互作用如何影响超导性，特别是无序（Se/S替代）对超导的关键作用。
AI.method: 通过Se/S替代引入可控的无序，对比clean样品和disordered样品的超导行为及费米面结构变化。
AI.result: 无序样品展现体超导性，而洁净样品不超导；无序导致Mott层中载流子退局域化，形成新的费米面。
AI.conclusion: Mott态的脆弱性及其退局域化产生的强关联电子海是驱动4Hb-TaS₂超导的主要因素。

title: Asymmetry dynamics and nonequilibrium symmetry-breaking phase transitions
summary: In classical settings, the Mpemba effect occurs when a hotter system cools faster than an initially colder one. In quantum systems, this effect can be reinterpreted exploiting the concept of symmetries, with the asymmetry of a subsystem playing the role of temperature. A quantum Mpemba effect arises when a more asymmetric state restores the symmetry faster than a less asymmetric one. Previous work mainly focuses on closed systems characterized by thermal equilibration and Hamiltonian symmetries. In this paper, we analyze the dynamics of asymmetry in an open quantum many-body system featuring symmetry breaking and uncover dynamical behavior that appears to be unique to these settings. In the symmetric phase, we demonstrate the existence of a quantum Mpemba effect, which emerges as a direct consequence of a non-monotonic evolution of the asymmetry. In the broken-symmetry phase, we analyze the imbalance between the system's ability to increase or to decrease its asymmetry. Our results extend the notion of quantum Mpemba effects to open quantum many-body systems exhibiting symmetry-breaking phase transitions and establish them as a platform for observing and controlling anomalous relaxation phenomena.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了开放量子多体系统中对称性破缺下的量子Mpemba效应，发现对称相中存在非单调不对称演化导致的量子Mpemba效应，并将该效应扩展至开放量子多体系统。
AI.motivation: 先前关于量子Mpemba效应的研究主要集中在由热平衡和哈密顿对称性表征的封闭系统中，作者希望将该效应扩展到开放量子多体系统，特别是具有对称性破缺相变的系统中，探索不对称动力学的新行为。
AI.method: 在开放量子多体系统中分析不对称性的动力学行为，区分对称相和对称破缺相两种情况。在对称相中，通过展示不对称性的非单调演化来证明量子Mpemba效应的存在；在对称破缺相中，分析系统增加或减少不对称性的能力之间的不平衡。
AI.result: 在对称相中，观察到量子Mpemba效应作为不对称性非单调演化的直接结果；在对称破缺相中，发现了系统不对称性增减能力之间的不平衡动力学行为。
AI.conclusion: 将量子Mpemba效应的概念扩展到了开放量子多体系统，特别是那些表现出对称性破缺相变的系统，并建立了一个观察和控制反常弛豫现象的平台。

title: Nonlinear sigma models, antiperiodic boundary conditions, spin chains, and 't Hooft anomalies
summary: We consider two sets of related models: initially, these are $SU(2)$ antiferromagnetic spin chains with $N$ sites of spin $S$, and the $O(3)$ nonlinear sigma model in two dimensions with topological coefficient $Θ$ a multiple of $π$ (and later, the extensions of these with any semisimple Lie group symmetry). It is known that, in a continuum description, the low-energy behavior of the spin chain is given by the sigma model with $Θ=2πS$. We study these models with $N$ odd and with antiperiodic (A) boundary condition (b.c.), respectively, which correspond. The A b.c. in the sigma model involves the $\mathbb{Z}_2$ inversion symmetry $\vec{n}\to-\vec{n}$, and amounts to a flux of a $\mathbb{Z}_2$ gauge field through a spacetime torus; summing over the two b.c.s for each direction would amount to gauging the $\mathbb{Z}_2$ inversion symmetry. We show directly that, if and only if $(-1)^{Θ/π}=-1$, the gauging cannot be carried out; there is an 't Hooft anomaly. The partition function for the A b.c. exists, but is not gauge invariant; consequently, the sum over b.c.s cannot be made modular invariant. The gauged model would be a sigma model with target space $\mathbb{R}\mathbb{P}^2\cong \mathbb{S}^2/\mathbb{Z}_2$, and hence this model does not exist for $Θ=π$ (mod $2π$). A related result is that, using semiclassical quantization, in the spin chain we obtain the known values of the ground-state crystal momentum, which at leading order depend only on $N$ modulo $4$ and $2S$ modulo $2$. For a large class of spin chains and associated sigma models we find similar results, but now $(-1)^{Θ/π}$ is replaced by the value $\pm 1$ of the square of the time-reversal operator acting on a single spin, which is still determined by the coefficients of the topological terms, in a way that depends on the symmetry group.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了SU(2)反铁磁自旋链与O(3)非线性sigma模型之间的对应关系，发现当拓扑系数Θ=π(mod 2π)时，由于't Hooft反常，无法对Z₂反演对称性进行规范，导致目标空间为RP²的sigma模型不存在。同时给出了自旋链基态晶体动量的半经典量化结果，并将其推广到更广泛的李群对称性情况。
AI.motivation: 作者希望深入理解自旋链与非线性sigma模型之间的精确对应关系，特别是边界条件、拓扑项和对称性规范之间的相互作用，以及这些因素如何影响模型的低能物理行为。
AI.method: 通过分析反周期边界条件（A b.c.）与Z₂反演对称性（n→-n）的关系，研究在时空环面上Z₂规范场的通量效应。通过检查规范不变性和模不变性，识别't Hooft反常的存在条件，并运用半经典量子化方法计算自旋链的基态晶体动量。
AI.result: 发现当且仅当(-1)^{Θ/π}=-1（即Θ=π mod 2π）时，Z₂反演对称性的规范无法进行，存在't Hooft反常。反周期边界条件的配分函数存在但不满足规范不变性，导致边界条件求和无法实现模不变性。对于自旋链，基态晶体动量在领头阶仅依赖于N mod 4和2S mod 2。对于更广泛的系统，(-1)^{Θ/π}被单个自旋上时间反演算符平方的值±1所取代。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了自旋链和sigma模型中拓扑项与反常之间的深刻联系，明确指出了某些看似合理的模型（如Θ=π时的RP² sigma模型）实际上不存在。这为理解低维量子磁体的拓扑性质提供了重要洞见，并建立了从离散自旋系统到场论描述的严格对应关系。

title: Correction of the basis set error due to the absence of the electron-electron cusp in the wave function by using an adiabatic correction
summary: This article proposes an analytical method to address the slow convergence of electronic structure calculations caused by the inability of finite one-particle basis sets to describe the electron-electron cusp. An equivalence is made between a calculation using a finite basis set with the physical Coulomb interaction and a calculation using a complete basis set with a model interaction (specifically, the error-function screened Coulomb potential characterized by a range-separation parameter $μ$). By leveraging the adiabatic connection formalism, a simple, parameter-free correction formula is derived. It depends only on the on-top pair density and a locally defined range-separation parameter ($μ$) derived from the basis set itself. This `adiabatic connection based basis set error correction' (ABC) is derived from the asymptotic expansion of the wave function at large $μ$ for small inter-electronic distances. Therefore it is applicable to both ground and excited states without the restriction imposed by the Hohenberg-Kohn theorem. Numerical tests illustrate that the method achieves chemical accuracy using smaller basis sets than typically required.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于绝热连接（adiabatic connection）的基组误差修正方法，通过将有限基组下的库仑相互作用映射为完备基组下的屏蔽库仑势，推导出仅依赖局域对密度和基组自身导出的范围分离参数的简单无参数修正公式，有效加速电子结构计算的收敛，在较小基组下即可达到化学精度。
AI.motivation: 有限单粒子基组无法准确描述电子-电子尖点（electron-electron cusp），导致电子结构计算收敛缓慢，需要发展一种能够在不使用极大基组的情况下修正基组误差的方法。
AI.method: 将有限基组下物理库仑相互作用的计算等价于完备基组下误差函数屏蔽库仑势（以范围分离参数μ刻画）的计算；利用绝热连接框架，推导出无参数修正公式；该公式仅依赖于局域对密度（on-top pair density）和基组自身定义的局域范围分离参数μ；修正公式来源于波函数在μ→∞、电子间距很小时的渐近展开。
AI.result: 数值测试表明，该方法在使用比常规要求更小的基组时即可达到化学精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的"基于绝热连接的基组误差修正"（ABC）方法简单、无自由参数，适用于基态和激发态，不受Hohenberg-Kohn定理限制，有效提升了电子结构计算中基组收敛的效率。

title: Engineering magnetic anisotropy and ferromagnetism in topological Kagome metal GdV6Sn6 via Nd substitution
summary: Kagome metals with the formula RM6X6 (R = rare-earth, M = 3d transition metal, and X = Sn/Ge) provide a rich platform for exploring magnetic and electronic phenomena, with tunable properties enabled by the combination of rare-earth elements and transition metals. In this study, we report the structural, electrical and magnetic properties of Kagome metal (NdxGd1-x)V6Sn6. We demonstrate that substituting lighter Nd atoms at the Gd site tunes the complex magnetic ground state of GdV6Sn6 into a ferromagnetic-like one. Moreover, the isotropic magnetization of GdV6Sn6 becomes anisotropic, with the c-axis emerging as the easy axis. Transport measurements reveal a strong coupling between magnetism and electronic properties, with negative magnetoresistance observed at low magnetic fields in all compositions. In addition, a fourfold anisotropy component tends to emerge in end compounds at higher magnetic fields. These findings highlight the role of rare-earth substitution in tuning magnetic anisotropy and magneto-transport behaviour in RM6X6 compounds, featuring a non-magnetic Kagome layer, with potential implications for spintronic and topological applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过用较轻的Nd替代Gd位，将Kagome金属GdV6Sn6的复杂磁性基态调控为铁磁态，并引入磁各向异性，同时观察到负磁阻和四重各向异性组分，揭示了稀土替代对磁性和电输运的调控作用。
AI.motivation: Kagome金属RM6X6体系中，稀土元素与过渡金属的组合提供了丰富的磁性和电子现象调控平台，但具体如何通过稀土替代来调控磁性基态和各向异性尚不清楚。
AI.method: 制备了(NdxGd1-x)V6Sn6系列样品，系统研究了其结构、电学和磁学性质，通过Nd替代Gd来观察磁性基态和各向异性的变化。
AI.result: Nd替代将GdV6Sn6的复杂磁性基态调控为铁磁态；各向同性磁化变为各向异性，c轴成为易轴；观察到负磁阻；端元化合物在高磁场下出现四重各向异性组分。
AI.conclusion: 稀土替代是调控RM6X6化合物磁各向异性和磁输运行为的有效手段，对自旋电子学和拓扑应用有潜在意义。

title: Squeezing dynamical singlets in bilayer nickelates
summary: We present realistic calculations within the density functional plus cluster dynamical mean-field formalism indicating that the physics of the the bilayer Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates is to a significant extent controlled by interlayer "dynamical singlets'' which are formed from the $3z^{2}-r^{2}$ orbitals singly occupied by electrons and are hybridized with itinerant planar $x^{2}-y^{2}$ orbitals. The hybridization is found to respond differently to hydrostatic pressure and to epitaxial strain, capturing the experimentally observed dichotomy between bulk single crystals and epitaxial thin films and reproducing several experimental results including angle-resolved photoemission and transport measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文通过密度泛函+团簇动力学平均场计算，发现双层Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐的物理主要由层间"动力学单态"控制，这种单态由占据$3z^{2}-r^{2}$轨道的电子形成，并与平面内$x^{2}-y^{2}$轨道杂化。这种杂化对静水压和外延应变响应不同，解释了块体单晶与外延薄膜之间的实验差异，并再现了ARPES和输运测量结果。
AI.motivation: 解释双层Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐中存在的块体单晶与外延薄膜之间的实验差异，揭示其背后的物理机制。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论(DFT)结合团簇动力学平均场(CDMFT)方法进行第一性原理计算。
AI.result: 发现层间$3z^{2}-r^{2}$轨道形成的"动力学单态"与平面内$x^{2}-y^{2}$轨道的杂化是关键，且该杂化对静水压和外延应变呈现不同的响应模式。
AI.conclusion: 该模型成功解释了块体单晶与薄膜之间的实验差异，并定量再现了ARPES和输运测量结果，表明动力学单态是理解这类材料的核心要素。

title: How Similar Can Fractional Chern Insulators Be to Fractional Quantum Hall States? Moiré-Enhanced Gaps and Excitation-Spectrum Correspondence
summary: Fractional Chern insulators (FCIs) realize fractional quantum Hall topology in lattice bands, but their excitation spectra remain far less understood than their ground states. Here we establish a theoretical principle relating the periodic electron-density modulations of flat Chern bands to the many-body gap and excitation spectrum of FCIs. Contrary to the conventional view that such density modulations are detrimental to fractional topology, we show that different reciprocal-lattice Fourier components play sharply distinct roles: components at smaller reciprocal lattice vectors suppress the FCI gap, whereas components at larger reciprocal lattice vectors enhance it. By suppressing the harmful small-wave-vector components and amplifying the beneficial large-wave-vector components, the gap enhancement can, in principle, be made arbitrarily large within the projected flat-band theory. Moreover, the same enhancement factor rescales the full low-energy spectrum, making the FCI excitation spectrum predictable from the corresponding Landau-level problem. We further generalize this correspondence to non-Abelian states. Applying this principle to moiré Chern bands, we identify these reciprocal-lattice density components as practical diagnostics for robust FCIs.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了平带Chern带中周期性电子密度调制对分数量子Chern绝缘体（FCIs）能隙和激发谱的不同影响机制，发现小波矢分量抑制能隙而大波矢分量增强能隙，并建立了可任意放大能隙的理论原理，将FCI激发谱与Landau能级问题对应起来。
AI.motivation: 分数量子Chern绝缘体（FCIs）的激发谱远不如其基态被理解，传统观点认为平带中的周期性电子密度调制对分数量子拓扑不利，但具体机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过分析Chern平带中电子密度调制的不同倒格矢傅里叶分量，区分其对FCI能隙的不同作用（小波矢抑制、大波矢增强），并利用投影平带理论证明该增强可任意放大，同时将低能谱与Landau能级问题建立映射关系，并推广至非阿贝尔态。
AI.result: 发现小倒格矢分量抑制FCI能隙，大倒格矢分量增强能隙；通过压制有害分量和放大有益分量，能隙可原则上任意增大；整个低能谱被相同因子缩放，使得FCI激发谱可由Landau能级问题预测；该原理可推广至非阿贝尔态，并能为moire Chern带中的鲁棒FCI提供实用诊断。
AI.conclusion: 建立了平带密度调制与FCI能隙及激发谱之间的定量关系，颠覆了传统认知，为设计和诊断强健的FCI材料提供了理论指导。

title: Oscillatory-nonnormal decomposition of dissipation in Ornstein-Uhlenbeck processes
summary: We provide a decomposition of the steady-state entropy production rate associated with an Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process into two contributions: one associated with oscillatory behavior and one associated with nonnormality. We also show that each contribution is associated with a different fundamental trade-off. The oscillatory contribution leads to the dissipation-coherence trade-off for noise-induced oscillations, which bounds the entropy production per oscillatory period by the number of oscillations within one correlation time. Notably, the trade-off is twice as strict as those conjectured or derived for other systems. The nonnormal contribution leads to a trade-off between entropy production and acceleration of relaxation. We also demonstrate the decomposition using a simple bead-spring model.

AI.tldr: 本文分解了Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程的稳态熵产生率，分为振荡贡献和非正态贡献两部分，并分别揭示了两种不同的基本权衡：振荡贡献导致耗散-相干权衡（每振荡周期的熵产受限于一个相关时间内的振荡次数），非正态贡献导致熵产与加速弛豫之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 理解非平衡稳态中熵产生的来源和机制，特别是振荡行为和非正态性对熵产的贡献及其约束关系。
AI.method: 对Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程的熵产生率进行理论分解，分别识别出振荡项和非正态项，并推导各自对应的基本权衡关系。
AI.result: 成功分解熵产生率为振荡和非正态两部分；发现振荡贡献的耗散-相干权衡比先前推测的严格两倍；发现非正态贡献的熵产与弛豫加速之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该分解揭示了噪声诱导振荡系统中熵产的基本约束，为理解非平衡系统中的能量-信息关系提供了新视角。

title: Inverse Melting of 3D Antiferromagnetic Order in Multi-sublattice Magnetic Perovskites
summary: In conventional antiferromagnets a long-range ordered 3D ground state transitions to a disordered paramagnetic state on warming, often via lower dimensional spin correlations within the critical regime. Here we demonstrate a striking departure from this paradigm. Through analysis of neutron powder diffraction data, we show that the magnetic ground state of columnar-ordered quadruple perovskites, Na$R$Mn$_2$Ti$_4$O$_{12}$ ($R$ = Dy, Sm), lacks long-range order, hosting only 2D spin correlations. On warming, this disordered state transitions into a 3D long-range ordered antiferromagnetic structure prior to the phase transition to the paramagnetic state. Our results establish an unconventional order-by-heating mechanism in which intrinsic A-site chemical disorder is coupled to competing exchange interactions between the rare earth and Mn sub-lattices, leading to a novel type of magnetic phase transition.

AI.tldr: 本文发现柱状有序四重钙钛矿NaRMn₂Ti₄O₁₂（R = Dy, Sm）在基态只存在二维自旋关联（无长程有序），升温后反而先出现三维反铁磁长程有序，再转变为顺磁态，建立了"加热致有序"（order-by-heating）的新型磁相变机制。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统反铁磁体从基态3D长程有序升温到顺磁态（通常通过低维临界关联）的范式，探索是否存在相反的行为。
AI.method: 利用中子粉末衍射数据分析，研究柱状有序四重钙钛矿NaRMn₂Ti₄O₁₂（R = Dy, Sm）的磁结构与相变行为。
AI.result: 基态缺乏长程磁有序，仅存在2D自旋关联；升温过程中，体系先进入3D长程有序反铁磁结构，然后才转变为顺磁态。建立了"加热致有序"（order-by-heating）机制。
AI.conclusion: 提出了"加热致有序"的新型磁相变机制：A位化学无序与稀土和Mn子格之间的竞争交换相互作用耦合，导致这一反常行为。

title: Reactivity-Informed Machine Learning for Performance Prediction and Design Space Exploration of Alkali-Activated Slag
summary: Establishing quantitative relationships among mix design, raw material properties, curing conditions, and performance remains a long-standing challenge in cementitious materials, particularly for alkali-activated materials with variable precursor and activator chemistry. Here, we curated the largest literature-derived alkali-activated slag (AAS) dataset to date, comprising over 3100 compressive strength records, 155 chemically distinct ground granulated blast-furnace slags (GGBSs), and 24 attributes incorporating precursor chemistry, fineness, and reactivity. Multiple machine learning (ML) algorithms were benchmarked across progressively enriched feature scenarios, demonstrating that integrating GGBS compositions, fineness, curing conditions, and specimen geometry improves predictive performance. The average metal oxide dissociation energy (AMODE), a physically interpretable representation of precursor reactivity, provides a compact alternative descriptor to explicit oxide compositions while enabling comparable predictive performance. Model interpretation revealed physically consistent trends from heterogeneous data, including non-monotonic effects of Na2O dosage and silicate modulus, reduced predicted strength at higher water content and larger specimen size, and coupled oxide-level effects more coherently represented by AMODE than by individual oxide contents. Statistically constrained design space exploration reveals reactivity-dependent trade-offs among strength, embodied CO2 emissions, and cost. The design maps identify high-strength regions with substantially lower CO2 emissions than OPC-based references at similar cost. Overall, this work demonstrates how reactivity-informed ML can extract physically meaningful trends from heterogeneous AAS data and guide source-dependent binder design. The curated dataset is publicly accessible to support advances in cement and concrete research.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了最大规模的碱激发矿渣数据集（3100+强度记录），利用机器学习建立配合比、原料性能与强度的定量关系，并引入平均金属氧化物解离能（AMODE）作为前驱体反应性的物理可解释描述符，实现了强度预测、模型物理解释及低碳低成本设计空间探索。
AI.motivation: 水泥基材料（尤其是碱激发材料）中，配合比、原材料、养护条件与性能之间的定量关系长期难以建立，因此作者希望借助大规模数据和机器学习来攻克这一挑战。
AI.method: 1) 构建含3100+强度记录、155种矿渣、24个属性的碱激发矿渣数据集；2) 对比多种机器学习算法在不同特征场景下的预测性能；3) 引入AMODE作为前驱体反应性的物理可解释描述符；4) 利用模型解释揭示物理一致的趋势；5) 结合统计学约束进行设计空间探索，权衡强度、CO₂排放和成本。
AI.result: 1) 集成矿渣成分、细度、养护条件和试件几何特征可提升预测性能；2) AMODE可用作氧化物成分的紧凑替代描述符，预测性能相当；3) 模型揭示了Na₂O用量与硅酸盐模数的非单调效应、高含水量和大试件尺寸导致强度降低、AMODE比单一氧化物更连贯地表征耦合效应；4) 设计图表明存在比OPC基准碳排放显著更低、成本相近的高强度区域。
AI.conclusion: 反应性引导的机器学习能从异质性AAS数据中提取物理有意义的趋势，并指导源依赖性胶凝材料设计。公开数据集将支持水泥与混凝土研究的进一步发展。

title: Direct High-Magnetic-Field Coupling to Stripe Order in a Cuprate Superconductor
summary: Superconductivity in cuprates emerges out of a complex normal state that hosts density waves, pseudogap physics, and strange metal properties. Here, we access this normal state by synchronizing free-electron laser x-rays with high-magnetic-field pulses up to 44 T. We observe a linear increase in charge order amplitude and correlation length that persists far above the vortex melting transition. This behavior is incompatible with standard phase competition between charge order and superconductivity. By means of conventional hard x-ray diffraction and magnetostriction, we show that applied fields also enhance monoclinic lattice distortions. However, this magnetoelastic response is weaker and an epiphenomenon of the stripe order enhancement. Combined with recent observations of field-linear spin freezing, our results point to a direct coupling between magnetic field and the spin component of stripe order in the high-field normal state -- a mechanism independent of superconductivity suppression that has so far remained hidden from scattering probes.

AI.tldr: 利用自由电子激光X射线与高达44 T的高磁场脉冲同步，研究了铜氧化物超导体的正常态。发现电荷有序振幅和相关长度随磁场线性增加，远超涡旋熔化转变温度，这与标准相竞争理论不符。同时观察到磁场增强单斜晶格畸变，但这种磁弹响应较弱，是条纹有序增强的副现象。结合磁场线性自旋冻结的最新观察，结果表明磁场与条纹有序的自旋分量存在直接耦合——这是一种独立于超导抑制的机制，此前未被散射探针揭示。
AI.motivation: 铜氧化物超导体的正常态非常复杂，包含密度波、赝能隙和奇异金属特性。理解这一正常态对于揭示高温超导机理至关重要，但传统方法难以在高磁场条件下直接探测电荷有序等量子序的演化。
AI.method: 将自由电子激光X射线与高达44 T的高磁场脉冲同步，同时结合常规硬X射线衍射和磁致伸缩测量，研究磁场对电荷有序、晶格畸变和条纹有序的影响。
AI.result: 1) 电荷有序振幅和相关长度随磁场线性增加，行为远超涡旋熔化转变温度，与标准相竞争理论预期不符；2) 磁场增强单斜晶格畸变，但该磁弹响应较弱，是条纹有序增强的副现象。
AI.conclusion: 磁场与条纹有序的自旋分量存在直接耦合，这是一种独立于超导抑制的新机制。该发现揭示了铜氧化物正常态中隐藏的量子序行为，为理解高温超导机理提供了新视角。

title: Non-Abelian braiding in Abelian Fractional Quantum Hall Phases from realistic interactions
summary: We propose a method of realizing non-Abelian braiding of fractionalized quasiholes in the Laughlin fractional quantum Hall phase at $ν=1/3$ with realistic two-body interactions within the lowest Landau level. It is numerically shown that low-lying gapped excitations near $ν=1/3$ are contained almost entirely within the null space of the three-body Moore-Read model Hamiltonian. They are thus quantum fluids of non-Abelian quasiholes that are in principle physically accessible. In particular, Laughlin ground state can be described as a fluid of ``$ψ$-type" quasiholes formed by binding a magnetic flux with a Majorana fermion (MF), and the Laughlin quasiholes are described by the ``$1$-type'' quasiholes, which are magnetic fluxes without a MF attached. Within the Laughlin phase, Laughlin quasiholes can be locally fractionalized into non-Abelian quasiholes, when the strong attraction between them is overcome by properly designed one-body electronstatic trapping potentials. Extensive numerics with proper finite-size scaling corroborate this physical picture, and our study points to the possibility of realizing non-Abelian braiding within an Abelian topological phase in experiment without the need for fine-tuning realistic electron-electron interaction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在Laughlin分数量子霍尔态（ν=1/3）中实现非阿贝尔任意子编织的方法，利用两体相互作用和静电势阱，无需精细调节电子间相互作用。
AI.motivation: 在阿贝尔拓扑相中实现非阿贝尔编织，避免对真实电子-电子相互作用的精细调节，从而使其在实验中更易实现。
AI.method: 利用两体相互作用在最低朗道能级内实现非阿贝尔准空穴的编织，将Laughlin基态描述为"ψ型"准空穴流体，Laughlin准空穴为"1型"准空穴。通过设计单电子静电势阱克服吸引力，实现局部分数化。
AI.result: 数值结果表明，ν=1/3附近的低能隙激发几乎完全包含在三体Moore-Read模型哈密顿量的零空间中，证明了非阿贝尔准空穴的物理可及性。有限尺寸标度分析支持该物理图像。
AI.conclusion: 该研究指出了在阿贝尔拓扑相中实验实现非阿贝尔编织的可能性，无需对电子-电子相互作用进行精细调节，为拓扑量子计算提供了更可行的途径。

title: Modelling time-irreversible avalanches
summary: We investigate the problem of the time reversal symmetry of fluctuations, as witnessed by the average shape of avalanches. This quantity has been measured in a variety of systems, ranging from magnetic materials to earthquakes. Although an asymmetric shape is often observed, which is a signature of a non-equilibrium dynamics, there is no general theoretical control of this feature. In this paper, we propose a non equilibrium extension of a paradigmatic model for ``crackling-noise'', the so called ABBM model. Our model is strictly related to the Brownian Gyrator, which has been previously introduced in stochastic thermodynamics as the simplest model for thermal anisotropy, but it can also be framed in the context of rate-and-state models. It reproduces the phenomenology observed in experiments on granular friction, and allows for a systematic theoretical study of the asymmetry. We manage to correlate a measure of asymmetry, that can be easily computed in experiments, with the entropy production rates of the dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文在ABBM模型中引入非平衡扩展（类似于布朗回转器），用以研究雪崩形状的时间反演对称性破缺，并建立了不对称性与熵产生率之间的理论关联。
AI.motivation: 尽管在许多系统（如磁性材料、地震）中观测到雪崩形状不对称（非平衡动力学标志），但缺乏对该特征的一般性理论控制。
AI.method: 提出ABBM模型的非平衡扩展，该模型与布朗回转器（随机热力学中热各向异性的最简单模型）密切相关，也可纳入率-态模型框架。
AI.result: 模型重现了颗粒摩擦实验中的现象学，并将实验中易于计算的不对称性度量与动力学熵产生率关联起来。
AI.conclusion: 为非平衡雪崩动力学的不对称性提供了系统性理论研究途径，建立了宏观可观测不对称性与热力学熵产生之间的桥梁。

title: Phase diagram of the extended chequerboard $J-Q$ model
summary: The chequerboard $J-Q$ model was proposed to describe the direct phase transition from the antiferromagnetic (AFM) state to the plaquette-sin glet (PS) solid state observed in SrCu$_2({\rm BO}_3)_2$. In this paper, we present a Monte Carlo study of the ground state of an extended ve rsion of this model. For all parameters investigated, we find only a direct first-order phase transitions from the AFM to the PS phase, with no intermediate phase between them. On the transition line, the system exhibits an emergent $O(4)$ symmetry. Furthermore, we find that the Bi nder ratio of the columnar valence-bond solid state can be used to locate the phase transition. It exhibits a monotonic finite-size scaling b ehavior, allowing for a precise determination of the transition point.

AI.tldr: 本文通过蒙特卡洛研究扩展的棋盘格$J-Q$模型，发现从反铁磁（AFM）到plaquette-singlet（PS）相仅为直接一级相变，无中间相，且相变线处表现出涌现$O(4)$对称性，并利用柱状价键固体的Binder比精确标定相变点。
AI.motivation: 理解SrCu$_2({\rm BO}_3)_2$中从反铁磁态到plaquette-singlet固态的直接相变机制，验证扩展棋盘格$J-Q$模型是否能描述该过程并探索是否存在中间相。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛方法研究扩展棋盘格$J-Q$模型的基态性质，分析不同参数下的相变行为及序参量标度。
AI.result: 在所有参数下仅观察到从AFM到PS的直接一级相变，无中间相；相变线处系统表现出涌现$O(4)$对称性；柱状价键固体的Binder比呈单调有限尺寸标度行为，可用于精确确定相变点。
AI.conclusion: 扩展的棋盘格$J-Q$模型能描述SrCu$_2({\rm BO}_3)_2$中的直接相变，且相变性质为一级，无中间相；Binder比可作为精确标定相变点的有效工具。

title: Scalable Prediction of Complex Surface Reconstructions under Operating Conditions via Harmony-Search-Based Global Optimization
summary: The dynamic structural evolution of catalyst surfaces under operating conditions dictates catalytic performance, yet capturing these reconstructions atomically remains challenging. Global optimization based on machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) is promising, but scaling to large-scale, low-symmetry operando systems is hindered by expansive search spaces and potential energy surface (PES) inaccuracies. Herein, we present Harmony-search-based Atomic Structural Global Optimization (HASGO), a framework integrating universal MLIPs with a harmony search algorithm. HASGO overcomes the problem of PES softening by incorporating a multi-head replay fine-tuning protocol. Moreover, the stochastic structural perturbation step in its algorithm offers a fault-tolerant strategy to enhance the robustness of global convergence. These enable HASGO to identify intricate surface oxide overlayers that align with atomic-resolution microscopy, thereby resolving the square-pyramidal subsurface O5 motif on Ag(100) during ethylene epoxidation. This scalable framework provides a robust approach for uncovering operando structures, accelerating the rational design of industrial catalysts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HASGO框架，结合通用机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）与和谐搜索算法，解决了催化剂表面在操作条件下结构重构的全局优化难题，成功识别了Ag(100)表面乙烯环氧化反应中的方锥形亚表面O5结构基元。
AI.motivation: 催化剂表面在操作条件下会发生动态结构重构，直接影响催化性能，但目前原子级捕捉这些重构极其困难。现有基于机器学习原子间势的全局优化方法难以扩展到大规模、低对称性的操作态系统，主要受限于巨大的搜索空间和势能面的不准确性。
AI.method: 提出HASGO框架，核心包括：(1) 将通用MLIPs与和谐搜索算法结合；(2) 采用多头重播微调协议克服势能面软化问题；(3) 引入随机结构扰动步骤作为容错策略，增强全局收敛的鲁棒性。
AI.result: HASGO成功识别出与原子分辨率显微镜一致的复杂表面氧化物覆盖层，具体解析了Ag(100)在乙烯环氧化反应中存在的方锥形亚表面O5结构基元。
AI.conclusion: HASGO是一个可扩展的框架，为揭示操作态催化剂结构提供了鲁棒的方法，有望加速工业催化剂的理性设计。

title: Atomic-scale phase-field modeling for 2D ferroelectrics including non-Gaussian fluctuations
summary: Atomic-scale phase-field modeling extends the phase-field framework down to the level of individual atoms by treating the probability density of atomic vibrations as a field variable and constructing a corresponding free-energy functional from this atomic field together with interatomic potentials. In this way, the framework has the potential to visualize local thermodynamic states with atomic-level resolution, just as conventional phase-field modeling has served as a computational microscope for free energy, stress, and related quantities at mesoscopic scales. However, existing formulations mainly assume Gaussian probability distributions for atomic vibrations, which limits their applicability to more complex and heterogeneous systems such as surfaces. In this work, we generalize the atomic-scale phase-field methodology by extending the free-energy functional to include non-Gaussian fluctuations. We apply this approach to monolayer SnTe in the NVT ensemble and show that the predicted equilibrium polarization is in better agreement with molecular dynamics simulations and that the ferroelectric-to-paraelectric phase transition is successfully reproduced. Furthermore, by decomposing the entropy on a per-atom basis, we visualize atomically resolved maps of local entropy and find that Sn atoms contribute more strongly to the entropy than Te atoms at high temperature, which is a driving factor of the ferroelectric-to-paraelectric phase transition.
